prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize protein intake for muscle recovery and strength gains

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all meals for one complete day (breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks)
Total daily protein intake meets or exceeds 190g (2g per kg bodyweight for strength athlete)
Plan is concise and formatted clearly for easy reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-sport athlete (powerlifter) emphasizing protein intake

prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with 4000+ calorie daily intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 4000+ calories across all meals and snacks
Includes balanced macronutrients suitable for endurance training (carbs 55-60%, protein 15-20%, fat 20-25%)
Provides 6 distinct meals/snacks distributed throughout the day
All meals are practical and can be prepared/consumed by a single athlete in one day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 4000+ calories

prompt_inputs.goal: Lose 3 kg over 2 weeks for boxing weight class while maintaining muscle mass

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for 1 day with specific food items
Total daily calories create a deficit appropriate for the 3kg/2-week goal (~1,800-2,000 kcal)
All meals are vegetarian and dairy-free
Includes adequate protein (minimum 1.6g per kg body weight) to preserve muscle during deficit
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a weight-class athlete (boxer) needing strict caloric deficit
